hero.title: Generate the n8n workflow you want in one sentence
hero.description: Describe an automation in your own words. The AI designs the trigger, nodes, branches, setup checklist, and workflow JSON you can import into n8n.
hero.tip: Built for operators, founders, marketers, support teams, and automation builders who want working workflows without drawing every node from scratch.

introduce.title: Automation briefs become structured workflows
introduce.label: Product
introduce.description: The generator turns messy business requirements into a practical n8n package: workflow JSON, assumptions, missing credentials, setup steps, and a test plan.

items.title: Prompt-first workflow design
items.description: Write the outcome you want and let the AI infer triggers, services, data fields, and branching logic.

items.title: Importable n8n JSON
items.description: Copy or download the generated workflow object and import it into your n8n workspace for refinement.

items.title: Credential checklist
items.description: See which apps, API keys, OAuth connections, and placeholders must be configured before activation.

items.title: Setup and test guidance
items.description: Each result includes assumptions, setup notes, warnings, and a simple validation plan.

benefits.title: From idea to automation draft in minutes
benefits.label: Benefits
benefits.description: Use the generator as a fast automation architect for repetitive operations, lead routing, alerts, content workflows, support triage, and internal tools.

items.title: Reduce blank-canvas setup
items.description: Start from a complete workflow draft instead of manually choosing every n8n node, connection, and parameter.

items.title: Make requirements explicit
items.description: The output separates assumptions, credentials, setup actions, and warnings so teams can review the automation before it runs.

items.title: Support real business scenarios
items.description: Guide the workflow by trigger type, complexity level, tone, integrations, schedule, timezone, and expected input fields.

usage.label: How it works
usage.title: A simple path from request to n8n import
usage.description: Keep the creative part in natural language and let the product produce the structured workflow package.

items.title: Describe the process
items.description: Tell the generator what should trigger the automation, which apps are involved, and what result you expect.

items.title: Tune the workflow
items.description: Choose a trigger style, complexity level, scenario tone, schedule, and whether to include notes or error handling.

items.title: Review the package
items.description: Check the summary, assumptions, credentials, setup steps, warnings, and test plan.

items.title: Import into n8n
items.description: Download the JSON, import it into n8n, connect credentials, test the run, and activate when ready.

features.title: Built for n8n workflow generation
features.description: Focused controls and outputs for people who want useful automation drafts, not generic chatbot answers.

items.title: Trigger-aware generation
items.description: Manual, webhook, schedule, form, email, app-event, or auto-detected workflow starts.

items.title: Production-mode guidance
items.description: Optional validation, branching, logging notes, and error-handling structure for serious automations.

items.title: n8n node conventions
items.description: Prompts favor stable n8n node types, deterministic positions, valid connections, and inactive workflows.

items.title: Copy and download
items.description: Move the generated workflow JSON into n8n quickly with copy and download actions.

items.title: Credential-safe output
items.description: The generator avoids secrets and lists required credentials instead of inventing private IDs.

items.title: Bilingual product experience
items.description: English and Chinese product pages, navigation, and generator copy are wired through next-intl.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Answers for teams evaluating natural-language n8n workflow generation.

items.question: Does the generated JSON import directly into n8n?
items.answer: The generator is designed to return an import-ready workflow object. You should still review credentials, placeholders, and test runs before activating the workflow.

items.question: Will it put my API keys into the workflow?
items.answer: No. The service asks the model to avoid secrets and credential IDs. Required accounts and keys are listed in the missing credentials and setup sections.

items.question: What kinds of automations work best?
items.answer: Lead routing, support triage, alerts, reporting, content operations, webhook processing, scheduled checks, and internal operations workflows are good first use cases.

items.question: Do I need to know n8n nodes?
items.answer: No, but reviewing the result in n8n is still important. The product gives you a strong draft and explains what needs to be configured.

cta.title: Start with a workflow idea
cta.description: Use the hero panel to turn a plain-language automation request into a practical n8n workflow package.
